user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Daily automation: Daily automated watchlist generation or on-demand 'which acc. Account: Tailspin Toys.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Tailspin Toys: the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades

required_artifacts: Prioritized watchlist (max 15 accounts) with risk driver

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF09-N trap (Watchlist format doesn't natively support shared-owner accounts); produces complete Prioritized watchlist (max 15 accounts) with risk driver, confidence, recovery actions, delta from y
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF09-N failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF09-N failure mode (Watchlist format doesn't natively support shared-owner accounts)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct migration architecture decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
